error_signature: No valid 'tasks[0].result' found in the input data
title: Code node error due to missing task results
symptom: The Code node throws an error stating 'No valid tasks[0].result found in the input data' when trying to access the results from the Data for SEO API.
not_this_if: Tasks array is correctly populated with results
root_cause: The error occurs because the expected structure of the input data does not match what the Code node is trying to access. Specifically, the 'tasks' array may be empty or not properly formatted, leading to the absence of the 'result' property.
fix_steps: Check the output of the HTTP request node to ensure it contains the 'tasks' array.
Verify that the 'tasks' array has valid entries and that 'result' is present in the first task.
Adjust the Code node to correctly reference the properties based on the actual structure of the input data.
agent_instruction: Ensure the 'tasks' array from the Data for SEO API contains valid results before executing the Code node.
